app.name: Retype
app.one_liner: Retype is a static website generator that transforms simple Markdown files into a complete, self-hosted website without requiring coding.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Display the main landing page of the generated website with navigation, content from README.md, and core components like search and sidebar.

rust_commands.name: build_site
rust_commands.purpose: Generate a static website from Markdown source files using Retype configuration.

acceptance_tests: Blog pages support configurable layout and display a left sidebar.
Generated site includes a functional search that indexes code blocks.
Next/Previous navigation can be hidden via configuration.
